title: Quick Start Guide and Documentation Overhaul for 0.1.0
summary: Design plan for a Quick Start guide and full documentation accuracy overhaul ahead of the 0.1.0 public release.
notes: Has goals/non-goals and success criteria like a PRD, but is scoped to documentation deliverables rather than product features; also carries some SPEC-like implementation detail (config file changes, nav structure). Classified PRD due to goals/non-goals/success-criteria structure outweighing the narrower SPEC signals.
